is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of P. falciparum infections: '903 P. falciparum infections were sequenced using MIP panels targeting major drug resistance mutations'.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfk13 R622I (622), C580Y (580); Pfmdr1 N86; Pfcrt K76T(76), N75E(75), N326S(326), R371I(371), A220S(220); Pfdhfr N51I(51), C59R(59), S108N(108); Pfdhps A437G(437), K540E(540), A581G(581). Many curated codons present.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Numerator/denominator given, e.g. R622I 369/833 (44.3%), dhfr N51I 99.4%, dhps A437G 88.8%, K540E 89.1%, A581G 5.0%, crt A220S 81.4%, N326S 73.3%, R371I 92.5%, mdr1 N86 99.8%. Supplementary tables give N and n per locus.

sub_country_location.evidence: Two districts (Gondar Zuria, Tach Armachiho) with 26 Kebeles; Fig 1C and S3 Table give per-Kebele prevalence, S2 Table per-district.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Collection Nov 1, 2022–Oct 31, 2023 (1 year), with monthly prevalence breakdowns (S4-S6 Tables). Well within 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical isolates from microscopy-confirmed patients at health centers in northwest Ethiopia; lab 3D7 only as control.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary cross-sectional genomic surveillance study with original sample collection and sequencing.

duplicate_risk.evidence: New year-round field collection in two districts; funded via EACCR consortium but samples are newly collected. Related prior Ethiopian studies exist (refs 13,16) but no stated overlap of these specific samples.

supplement.evidence: Per-Kebele and per-locus counts live in supplementary tables not provided: 'S1-S3 Table' (overall, per-district, per-Kebele prevalence with N and n) and 'S1 Data'. Main text gives district-level and overall frequencies, but finest site-level extraction needs the supplementary XLSX files.

assessment.summary: Primary genomic surveillance study of 903 P. falciparum infections from two districts (Gondar Zuria, Tach Armachiho; 26 Kebeles) in northwest Ethiopia, Nov 2022-Oct 2023. Reports extractable frequencies for many curated markers (k13 622/580, mdr1 86, crt 76/75/326/371/220, dhfr 51/59/108, dhps 437/540/581) at district, Kebele, and monthly resolution. Meets all criteria; finer per-Kebele/per-locus data are in supplementary tables not provided.
